description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 18 hrs 38 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 6 mins. His WakaTime activity was mostly in Java and Other, with additional time in Markdown and TypeScript across 5 projects. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories are listed this week.
